real_world_trigger: Game sign-up asks for name, school, and home address
practical_benefit: Child learns share / ask first / keep private before filling online forms
family_outcome_next_step: Check one favourite app's sign-up questions together
learning_objective: Help younger children tell the difference between friendly facts and private details

real_world_trigger: Prize scam: send your address to claim a reward
practical_benefit: Shared red/yellow/green language so kids pause under pressure
family_outcome_next_step: Place a traffic-light reminder near the main family device
learning_objective: Build a simple family language for stop, slow down, and ask for help online

real_world_trigger: Friend asks for tablet or account password
practical_benefit: Passwords treated like house keys; less credential sharing
family_outcome_next_step: Review one child account password together
learning_objective: Introduce passwords as family-only secrets that protect trusted spaces and devices

mission_name: Who Can I Talk To Online?
real_world_trigger: Stranger in-game chat asks where you live
practical_benefit: Clear path: log off and tell a trusted adult; less grooming risk
family_outcome_next_step: Save child's safe grown-ups list where they can find it quickly
learning_objective: Help children recognise when online contacts are trusted helpers and when they are strangers

real_world_trigger: Class or school site asks what to publish about the child
practical_benefit: Understands digital footprint starts with small public facts
family_outcome_next_step: Spot one profile detail to keep private going forward
learning_objective: Show that every post or profile shares pieces of a child's digital footprint

real_world_trigger: Parent wants to post a photo of child and friend
practical_benefit: Consent before posting; respects no and reduces friendship friction
family_outcome_next_step: Choose one written family rule for photo sharing
learning_objective: Teach children that privacy includes asking before posting pictures, videos, or messages

real_world_trigger: Years of daily Roblox/YouTube—what do platforms know?
practical_benefit: Sees apps build profiles over time; motivates settings review
family_outcome_next_step: Open privacy settings on one heavily used app
learning_objective: Help children recognise that apps build profiles from the information they collect over time

real_world_trigger: Free Robux or prize—log in via message link
practical_benefit: Pause on urgency and rewards; open official sites not message links
family_outcome_next_step: Practice opening a trusted website without clicking links
learning_objective: Teach families to slow down, check the sender, and avoid urgent scam messages

real_world_trigger: New game requests location, contacts, and microphone
practical_benefit: Questions whether an app really needs each permission
family_outcome_next_step: Turn off at least one unnecessary permission on a real app
learning_objective: Help children question whether an app really needs the data or device access it requests

real_world_trigger: First Instagram or social account after parent approval
practical_benefit: Private account and safer defaults before first post
learning_objective: Build confidence changing privacy settings before a child starts a new social or gaming account

real_world_trigger: Classmate forwards screenshot into group chat
practical_benefit: Screenshot chains create lasting footprint; reduces bullying-by-forwarding
family_outcome_next_step: Family pause phrase: Would I share this if everyone could see it?
learning_objective: Show how screenshots can turn private moments into lasting digital footprints

real_world_trigger: School password found in a data breach
practical_benefit: Passphrases and no reuse; less account takeover
family_outcome_next_step: Upgrade one important family account password
learning_objective: Teach families how to build strong, memorable passwords without reusing them everywhere

real_world_trigger: One hacked account; same password on many services
practical_benefit: Password manager and 2FA; limits cascade breaches
family_outcome_next_step: Enable 2FA on one critical account; store backup codes safely
learning_objective: Help teens create a realistic account security plan they will actually keep using

real_world_trigger: Employer or college searches teen's name before interview
practical_benefit: Knows what search results show; can edit before applications
family_outcome_next_step: Improve or archive one public profile or search result
learning_objective: Show teens how digital reputation affects opportunities long after a post is shared

real_world_trigger: People-search site lists home address, family, income
practical_benefit: Understands broker opt-out; reduces stalking and fraud exposure
family_outcome_next_step: Document opt-out steps for one broker site
learning_objective: Reveal how public records and commercial data create detailed family profiles online

real_world_trigger: School shares assessment data with third-party tutoring app
practical_benefit: Uses COPPA/GDPR/FERPA framing to challenge over-collection
family_outcome_next_step: Check one app's deletion, consent, and data-access policy
learning_objective: Help teens connect privacy laws to their real rights at school, online, and in everyday apps

real_world_trigger: Party photo causes school drama days later
practical_benefit: Practices audience, location tags, and deletion limits safely
family_outcome_next_step: Review location-sharing on one social app
learning_objective: Give teens a safe space to practise high-pressure sharing decisions before they happen for real

real_world_trigger: Pasting friend's essay into ChatGPT for feedback
practical_benefit: Treats AI prompts as potentially public; avoids leaking others' PII
family_outcome_next_step: Review one AI tool's privacy settings and history
learning_objective: Help teens treat AI prompts like public submissions unless they know the privacy settings and limits
